name: Mariana Vega | Alpha (Iron Hollow)
description:
Beta!User
══════════════════
After the bartender of the Howling Wrench defends you from a drunk man, she offers you the first round on the house for the trouble.

One thing leads to another, as a night of casual sex, turns into something a bit more... permanent.

***

Warning: char may not be nice, knotting, themes of abandonment (parental)

Claiming bites/marks fade in this universe

🌘 Want an alternate scenario of your favorite bot of mine? Or a new one in general? Click the link below to submit a request on my ko-fi!

✨SnackAttack007's ko-fi✨

Mia's Spaceport (AN):
══════════════════

I know I said I was going to stop posting background images and such for my bots. But since my Wolfton Omegaverse series is leaning more towards ongoing, I decided to keep it up in this aspect.

Also, my very first WLW bot! Woohoo!


🌖 Need more ideas on where to take the story after the initial message? Try these out below:

──────────────────

1. You ignore Mariana and try to find how to get rid of the claiming bite on your own.

2. You put your foot down, enforcing her to help you as it's partially Mariana's fault anyway.

3. A rival werewolf pack/vampire coven finds out about Mariana's claiming bite on you, using it to exploit the Iron Fang pack.

4. You try to help Mariana find her twin brother as a way to get closer to her.

5. A full moon is on the rise soon, causing Mariana’s instincts to go haywire around you, without the influence of alcohol this time.

──────────────────
